title: theaceae
intro: Theaceae is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as tea families. It is a taxonomic rank that groups plants with similar characteristics, such as the Camellia and Staphylotrys genera. These plants are primarily found in Asia, and are known for producing fragrant flowers and edible leaves. Theaceae family is characterized by having flowers with a distinct arrangement of sepals and petals, and often produce showy white, pink, or red blooms.
